title: [Cobblemon] Jet's Biome Besties
description: A Cobblemon Addon that is dedicated to adding cosmetic variants for pokemon dependant to specific biomes/climates!
body:
# Explore the vairous different biomes in Cobblemon with a completely new mindset!!

Currently this addon consists of 11 different categories for pokemon to appear in!

What is this addon? This addon is a project of mine that adds different forms for different biomes! These forms do not change typing or stats, just looks. Each subcategory has its own different aesthetic!

<details>
<summary>Subcategory Info</summary>

11 Subcategories:

  Floral     - Flower Biomes
  Scorched   - Nether Biomes
  Dusty      - Desert Biomes
  Void       - End Biomes
  Cavern     - Cave Biomes
  Wetland    - Swamp/Lush Biomes
  Frosty     - Ice/Snow Biomes
  Sapling    - Forest Biomes
  Tropic     - Jungle Biomes
  Oceanic    - Ocean Biomes
  Urban      - The Players Base!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Evolution Info</summary>

Dusty Pineco -> Driwud (lvl 31)

Floral Corsola -> Corflora (use petal dance 30 times)

Poochyena -> Mighticabra (interact with a 'Fossilized Drake')

Gimmighoul -> Golemarche (give exactly 64 coins, make it hold a compass, and have it be within a Trial Chamber)

Frosty Flittle -> Thermivian (interact with a spell tag)

Oceanic Phantump -> Garbajira (trade)

Void Tentacool -> Tentathulu (lvl 30)

Urban Magikarp -> Taiyakarp (lvl 20)

Fomantis -> Wetland Lurantis (Water Stone)

Wetland Wooper -> Harvesire (lvl 20)

</details>


In the future I may add more subcategories, and include a list on this description of what mons exactly. But for now, I will let you all explore and find out for yourself!

this addon is not to be used on public servers without my permission - please message me on discord if you wish to feature my addon!!
